title: File race conditions
description: Given filesystem edge cases (file appears/disappears during scan, truncated JSON), Virtuus should handle all gracefully without crashing. Corrupted files are reported as errors, valid records remain accessible. Spec: features/concurrency/file_race_conditions.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting: review feature scenarios and existing step coverage; plan implementation for Rust/Python steps. Next: add steps + tests. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: added refresh error tracking, Python/Rust steps for file race conditions, and verified behave + rust cucumber. Next: referential integrity under load. Blockers: none.
